item.title: Meh meh and stoof
item.description:
My parents got a new kitten that looks like this cat, he's a cute little murder machine.
The clock in my car is only right half the year. I won't have to worry soon I guess.
Mine is pink.
They're sooo cute.
This post is also not approved by the vatican.
I sent this to my gbff, he's a short king.
Ew, nickleback.
My team would have a mimikyu.
Let's goooo
My partner and I make cat noises across the house to each other.
I never hit my slut era, who knows what my future will be like.
So much dumb, in such a modest ass.
I've cried so much over so many pets, it all worth the time I had with them.
I'm finally finding myself in my 30s.
My grandma is a crazy bitch, my mom is pretty nutty, it's not looking good for my sister and I.
Think of all the toe beans.
I love my furry monsters.
My parents new cat, Dash. My niece named him, and it fits.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Megara Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— finally did a photo shoot as my favorite Disney leading lady: Megara. This is the first wig I styled (actually splicing together a wig, ponytail clip, etc) so I’m really proud!
Reference photo.

item.title: Creamy shrimp and gnocchi recipe!
item.description: https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/creamy-shrimp-and-gnocchi/ 16 ounces gnocchi 1 pound large shrimp peeled, tails left on or removed depending on preference 1 tablespoon Roasted Garlic Pepper Blend or use a mix of salt, garlic powder, and black pepper 1 tablespoon olive oil 4 tablespoons butter divided 1 yellow onion peeled and diced 1 tablespoon Citrus & Chili Marmalade or use your favorite hot honey 1 heaping tablespoon flour 1 cup chicken broth or water ⅓ cup heavy cream ⅓ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese Red pepper flakes optional, to taste 1 lemon juiced with 1/2 teaspoon zest ⅓ cup loosely packed fresh parsley minced Salt and pepper to taste Instructions Prepare the gnocchi: Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil. Add the gnocchi and cook until they float to the top. Drain and rinse thoroughly with water to keep them from sticking. Fry the shrimp: Pat the shrimp dry and season them with garlic pepper. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wide pot over medium-high heat. Once the oil is hot, add 2 tablespoons butter. As soon as the butter is melted and bubbly, add the shrimp and arrange them into an even layer. Fry without moving for 3 minutes. Flip and cook 1–2 minutes more. Do not overcook! It’s alright if the shrimp aren’t all perfectly opaque. Transfer them to a large bowl. Prepare the sauce: Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons butter into the pot. Adjust the heat to medium heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring often, for 8–10 minutes until it begins to brown around the edges and soften completely. Add the Citrus & Chile marmalade and stir to coat the onions. Add the flour and stir to coat. Cook for 1–2 minutes. Simmer the sauce: Slowly stir in the broth or water. Continue stirring until completely smooth. Once the liquid begins to bubble, stir in the cream and parmesan. Taste and season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of red pepper flakes if you like. Simmer for 5 minutes. Finish the shrimp and gnocchi: Stir in the lemon juice and zest and the fresh parsley. Add the shrimp and gnocchi and let bubble in the sauce for 5 minutes just to warm the gnocchi and shrimp. Taste and season once more. To serve: Spoon the shrimp and gnocchi into shallow bowls. Garnish with more parsley if you like. Enjoy!

item.title: A Turtle's Nap Time
item.description: Sea Turtles ' Chelonioidea ' can hold their breath for a very long time, depending on their species, health, and activity level. When active, they usually come up for air every 5 minutes, but they can stay underwater for up to 10 hours when sleeping.
item.dc:creator: learnhappy2

item.description:

Link to BNN article: https://bnnbreaking.com/world/us/congressional-democrats-propose-bill-to-curb-hedge-fund-control-over-us-homes/ Link to 'End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act' pdf: https://adamsmith.house.gov/_cache/files/4/e/4e6f30ad-c8f0-438d-9b6f-99f4093b1162/57491D49DB8A7DE1F076D17C08DB4F2F.2023-end-hedge-fund-control-of-american-homes-act.pdf

item.title: Beautifully Weird Video Dump
item.description:
#1. The best online baker aka Dylan Hollis
#2. The Model Walk
#3. Golfing Challange
#4. Getting Weird
#5. Only correct way to deal with HOA tattle tails
#6. Yes
#7. It's almost that time of year again
#8. Every body is beautiful and handsome and nice and give yourself a cookie!
#9. Who was first the Nail or the Hammer
#10. Nail Clips
#11. Totally how to make friends the Metal way
#12. It will work.....Trust me!
#13. The double entendre's and puns are strong here
#14. The Human HeiHei
#15. Nothing will be more adorable as this. NOTHING!!!
#16. Fun with strangers
#17. Fun with strangers part 2
#18. Be yourself, stay weird in Heals!
#19. The origins of the Chihuahua
#20. It was too early. Also coffee in sight, are you insane!
item.dc:creator: Sidaige

item.title: Dump of stuff on my phone pt 3
item.description:
Classic Toby
Another spanish meme that I know just enough context for
For the glory of Satan of course!
I will never get tired of this joke
Ive always wanted to make a meme with that one Hellboy strip where they say the Monkey has a gun but instead its an Axe. But alas I have no photoshop skills
Feel free to send this to all of your friends for their birthdays
Kinda want this tattooed on me ngl
This one always had me cackling by the time I reached the end
An old school meme!
Goth Sailor Moon is a vibe
This is another of my favorites
If you havent seen "Theres only soup!" I would recommend watching the TF2 edit first rather than the original. I think its way funnier
For your reaction image needs
Soul Eater is my favorite anime and I really wish there was more content for it
Did you guys know a bunnys heartrate can reach 300 bpm? That shits wild
Sure hope this one uploads with sound.
You should all go check out Drawfee on youtube. By far my favorite content creators of which this artist is a member
This show was the shit back in the day
Ive never once used this
Perry the platypus!
If you know you know
You should all also watch Taskmaster to understand this reference. Seasons 7 and 9 are my favorites
Sorry for the repeat
Iconic
item.dc:creator: searching4somewhere

item.title: Serving up bottom shelf memes for breakfast.
item.description:
Breakfast? You mean coffee?
@@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooo.
ONLY TWO DAYS LEFT TO CONFIRM YOUR GIFT! Don't give your money to Bezos this year. Instead, why don't we support our Imgur entrepreneurs? If you are a creator, you can promote your merchandise on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka in our # shameless-self-promos channel. (Please be sure to pick up the "Creator" role in onboarding) If you're not a creator, you are still invited to join to support our Imgurian artists!
Oof. I edited the meme and still did a shit crop. My bad. We're doing another Bottom Shelf Community meme review next Wednesday (December 20) at 9:30 pm CST on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka We will be taking OC meme submissions until Tuesday at 9:30 pm CST on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
THANK YOU @sciron FOR THE BESTEST GIFT EVER!! I have been a HUGE fan of yours for a while now. I even made a comment back in APRIL about wishing I'd get you for Secret Santa. MY IMGUR THEMED ART STUDIO NOW HAS AN UPVOTE TREE! *Including Gardians of the Upvote*
Lmao it can also be a downvote tree! @sciron absolutely KILLED IT this year, and I am SO HAPPY! (Thank you @MartynMage for an awesome match) Please take a moment to check out his process in his post here: https://imgur.com/gallery/4h5Jo55
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax Gif created by @Iamnoonewhoareyou
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Equivalent to almost 5 cups of coffee or 4 redbulls
item.description: The crazy thing is it's not even advertised as an energy drink. 400mg of caffeine is an insane amount considering you can get free refills. FP edit: Legal Eagle did a break down on this after the first lawsuit https://youtu.be/vKwrMD7zDvM?si=4-bKHuMcvx0V7HnW

item.dc:creator: rockyandchloe

item.title: Storm in Aeroparque, Buenos Aires, Argentina
item.description:
Last night we got a storm with winds speeds of ~100 km/h. I work in this airport but was my day off, so these videos and images are from my coworkers. In this meme a coworker did (could not get the original) we can see a Boeing 737-76N, which weighs ~41 tons, jumping the wedge? (dont know the word in english for the triangular thing that goes in the wheel and keeps it in place in normal conditions), throwing away a 1 ton stair and a cargo cart
Same thing from another angle
These stairs weights around 1 ton. This stair was not secured properly.
These bridges has reinforced glass
A Random sliding door
Trees in the street also got broken and fell off
These poor cars
Damn nature, you scary
item.dc:creator: SillyMistMaker
